SYSTEM_PROMPT: A cinematic urban night photography world characterized by atmospheric lighting, reflective surfaces, and glowing city environments. Scenes take place in modern urban nightlife settings where streetlights, neon signage, vehicle headlights, and interior lighting create layered reflections across glass, metal, and wet surfaces. The visual style emphasizes natural environmental lighting, soft bokeh highlights, luminous reflections, and subtle optical bloom. Images often feature shallow depth of field, cinematic contrast, and gentle film grain that enhance the realism of nighttime photography. The atmosphere can range from quiet and contemplative to vibrant urban nightlife, capturing fleeting moments within illuminated city environments. Reflections, light diffusion, and glowing highlights interact naturally with the surroundings, creating visually rich compositions without imposing rigid framing or camera placement. The overall aesthetic evokes contemporary cinematic photography where mood, lighting, and reflective textures shape the visual identity of the scene.
LIGHTING: Mixed warm and cool night lighting
